wikitext:
{{#setmainimage:StS2 Map-Elite.png|quiet}} {{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Hatnote|See {{2|Map Locations}} for all possible rooms.}} Elites are highly powerful enemies that are found in {{2|Map Locations#Elites|Elite Encounters}} which are marked separately from normal monster encounters. Defeating an elite will give you a random {{2|Relic}}, 35-45 ({{Asc|3|26-34|2}}) {{2|Gold}}, and a {{2|Cards|Card}} reward. The same Elite can appear multiple times in an act, but all 3 different Elites in an {{2|Acts|Act}} have to be encountered first before an Elite repeats. The same Elite cannot be encountered twice in a row. == Ascension Modifiers == * {{Asc|1|Ascension|2}}: Elites are around 60% more common on the map. * {{Asc|3|Ascension|2}}: Enemies and Treasure Chests drop 25% less Gold. * {{Asc|8|Ascension|2}}: All Enemies have more HP. * {{Asc|9|Ascension|2}}: All Enemies deal more damage. == Relic Interactions == * {{R|Black Star||2}}: Elites will drop an extra relic. * {{R|White Star||2}}: Elites will drop an additional Rare card reward. * {{R|Booming Conch||2}}: At the start of Elite combats, draw 2 additional cards. * {{R|War Hammer||2}}: Whenever you kill an Elite, Upgrade 4 random cards. * {{R|Sling of Courage||2}}: Start each Elite combat with 2 {{KW|Strength||2}}. * {{R|Sword of Stone||2}}: Transforms into {{R|Sword of Jade||2}} after defeating 5 Elites. == Act 1 Elites == === Overgrowth ===
